title: 80s Party
description: Classic 80s music, retro lights and old-school vibes.

title: Techno Party
description: Dark room, heavy bass, electronic sound and techno crowd.

title: Rooftop Sunset Party
description: Chill house music with skyline views as the sun goes down.

title: Street Food Night Market
description: Local vendors serving international street food and desserts.

title: Bavarian Beer & Pretzel Fest
description: Traditional Bavarian food, pretzels and local beer specials.

title: Vegan Pop-Up Kitchen
description: Plant-based dishes from a rotating guest chef collective.

title: 5-a-Side Football Meetup
description: Casual pickup football, all skill levels welcome.

title: Sunset Yoga Session
description: Outdoor group yoga to start the day, mats provided.

title: Streetball 3v3 Tournament
description: Fast-paced 3v3 basketball, sign up on arrival.

title: Open Air Art Exhibition
description: Local artists showcase paintings, sculptures and live sketching.

title: Live Mural Painting
description: Watch street artists create a mural live over the afternoon.

title: Board Game Meetup
description: Casual board and card games, all games provided.

title: Language Exchange Night
description: Practice new languages with locals and travelers over drinks.

title: Photography Walk
description: Group photo walk along the river, all camera types welcome.
